label: Create Order Request
description: The request payload submitted by a customer to place an order. Arrives at POST /orders after JWT authentication and schema validation.

fields.name: lineItems
fields.description: The items the customer wants to purchase.
constraints: Must contain at least one item
Each item must have a positive quantity

fields.name: shippingAddress
fields.description: The delivery address for the order.
constraints: Must be a supported delivery region

fields.name: idempotencyKey
fields.description: Optional client-supplied idempotency key. If provided, the server may use it for deduplication at the API gateway layer.

label: Create Order Response
description: The response returned to the customer after a successful order creation. Contains the order ID and the Stripe client_secret needed to complete payment on the client side.

fields.name: orderId
fields.description: The unique identifier for the newly created order.

fields.name: status
fields.description: The initial order status. Always 'AWAITING_PAYMENT' on creation.

fields.name: clientSecret
fields.description: Stripe PaymentIntent client_secret. The customer uses this to confirm payment on the client side via Stripe.js.

fields.name: reviewFlag
fields.description: Present and true when the order has been flagged for manual review due to a high total value (> $10,000). Informs the customer that their order will require additional review before confirmation.

label: Order Record
description: The persisted order entity in the database. The source of truth for order state.

fields.name: orderId
fields.description: Primary key. Unique identifier for the order.

fields.name: userId
fields.description: The authenticated user who placed the order.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current state in the order state machine.
constraints: Enum: AWAITING_PAYMENT | CONFIRMED | PENDING_REVIEW | PAYMENT_FAILED | SHIPPED | DELIVERED | CANCELLED

fields.name: lineItems
fields.description: Snapshot of the items at the time of order creation. Immutable after creation.
constraints: Stored as JSONB. Not updated after order creation — reflects what was ordered, not current inventory.

fields.name: total
fields.description: Total order value in the smallest currency unit (cents). Computed at creation time from lineItems.

fields.name: paymentIntentId
fields.description: Stripe PaymentIntent ID associated with this order. Used to reconcile payment events.

fields.name: reviewFlag
fields.description: True when the order total exceeds $10,000. Causes the order to require manual review before auto-confirmation.

fields.name: shippingAddress
fields.description: Delivery address snapshot.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: UTC timestamp of order creation.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: UTC timestamp of last status update.

label: Payment Completed Event
description: Kafka event published by the Payment Service when a Stripe payment is successfully confirmed. Consumed by the Order Service to transition the order to CONFIRMED.

fields.name: eventId
fields.description: Unique event identifier. Used for deduplication.

fields.name: orderId
fields.description: The order this payment confirmation belongs to.

fields.name: paymentIntentId
fields.description: The Stripe PaymentIntent ID that was confirmed. Must match the paymentIntentId stored on the order.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Amount confirmed in smallest currency unit (cents).

fields.name: confirmedAt
fields.description: UTC timestamp of when Stripe confirmed the payment.

label: Payment Failed Event
description: Kafka event published by the Payment Service when a Stripe payment fails. Consumed by the Order Service to transition the order to PAYMENT_FAILED.

fields.name: eventId
fields.description: Unique event identifier. Used for deduplication.

fields.name: orderId
fields.description: The order this failure belongs to.

fields.name: paymentIntentId
fields.description: The Stripe PaymentIntent ID that failed.

fields.name: failureReason
fields.description: Human-readable reason for payment failure from Stripe.

fields.name: failedAt
fields.description: UTC timestamp of when the payment failure was recorded.

label: Order Line Item
description: A single product and quantity within an order. Used both in the request payload and stored as a snapshot in the order record.

fields.name: productId
fields.description: Identifier of the product being ordered.

fields.name: quantity
fields.description: Number of units of this product.

fields.name: unitPrice
fields.description: Price per unit in smallest currency unit (cents) at the time of order creation. Snapshotted to prevent price changes from affecting historical orders.

fields.name: productName
fields.description: Snapshotted product name at the time of order. Prevents order history from breaking if a product is renamed.
